simple_types.name: MutableBytes
simple_types.code:
type MutableBytes is limited private
with Iterable => (First       => First,
                  Next        => Next,
                  Has_Element => Has_Element,
                  Element     => Unsafe_Get);

subprograms.name: Append
Append
subprograms.code: procedure Append (Self: in out MutableBytes; Src: Byte)

subprograms.code: procedure Append (Self: in out MutableBytes; Src: MutableBytes)

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code: procedure Append (Self: in out MutableBytes; Src: Character)

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code: procedure Append (Self: in out MutableBytes; Src: String)

subprograms.name: As_String
subprograms.code: function As_String (Self: MutableBytes; First, Last: SizeType) return String

documentation.description:
Get a slice of MutableBytes as a string. Note that tentative to create
a slice of size > Integer'Last will result in a constraint error
exception.

subprograms.name: Has_Element
subprograms.code: function Has_Element (Self: MutableBytes; C : Cursor) return Boolean

documentation.description: Move content from a MutableBytes object to a Bytes object.

subprograms.code: function Next (Self: MutableBytes; C: Cursor) return Cursor
